audience: English-speaking VisualVibe website visitors whose personal data may be processed in Belgium
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Begrijpen welke persoonsgegevens VisualVibe verwerkt, waarom, hoe lang en welke AVG-rechten de bezoeker heeft

searchIntent.question: How does VisualVibe process my personal data and exercise GDPR rights?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Belgium and the European Economic Area

directAnswer: VisualVibe processes only data visitors provide or data needed to operate and secure the website, using the legal bases, retention periods and safeguards described in this policy.
title: Privacy policy | VisualVibe
metaDescription: Learn how VisualVibe processes personal data, why we use it, how long we retain it and which rights you have under the GDPR.
factsToPreserve: Analysis quota windows of 24 hours and 30 days
Technical quota retention of up to 91 days
Google Ireland Ltd. processor and transfer safeguards
